Susanna Reid Crystal Palace chairman Steve Parish getting married, when break with ex-partner much weight lost?
SUSANNA Reid best known co-presenting Good Morning Britain alongside Piers Morgan.
Susanna Reid?
Where from?
Susanna Victoria Reid, from Croydon, South London.
born December 1970.
educated independent Croham Hurst School, followed independent Croydon High School then Paul's Girls' School London.
Susanna studied politics, philosophy University Bristol where editor Epigram, student newspaper, which short-listed 1991 Best Student Newspaper Guardian/NUS student journalism awards.
then undertook Postgraduate Diploma Broadcast Journalism Cardiff School Journalism.
Susanna Reid dating Crystal Palace chairman Steve Parish?
getting married?
Susanna went public with boyfriend, Steve Parish, November 2018 when they were pictured Crystal Palace Chelsea match.
friend said: "They have known each other several years through their connections Palace."
January 2019 Susanna revealed "very happy" with beau, insisted didn't want married.
Susanna been married before?
star previously with former sports presenter Dominic Cotton from 1998 until they separated February 2014.
They have three children together Jack, Finn.
Where Susanna Reid start career?
After leaving University, Susanna began career Radio Bristol then became reporter Radio Live, well producer before joining News where spent years reporter.
When 11pm presenter didn't turn night, Susanna became stand-in presenter hour (while three months pregnant with first child), which turned into permanent position.
Before going maternity leave, presented BBC's online interactive service then became reporter Breakfast News 1998.
After second maternity break, became presenter News Channel.
From 2003 Susanna became main presenters Breakfast, with Bill Turnbull Mondays, Tuesdays Wednesdays previously presented with Charlie Stayt Fridays, Saturdays Sundays.
2010, Reid stepped down from presenting Breakfast Saturdays Sundays take role programme Sunday Morning Live.
When Susanna Reid Strictly Come Dancing?
December 2013, Susanna runner-up eleventh series Strictly Come Dancing with partner Kevin Clifton.
lost taking glitterball trophy model Abbey Clancy.
previously participated Children Need special show, pairing with Robin Windsor eventually winning November 2011.
long Susanna Reid presented Good Morning Britain?
February 2014, reported that were attempting recruit Susanna their breakfast programme, with £1million salary.
Susanna previously rejected claims moving December 2013, during Strictly Come Dancing stint, claiming would "bleed BBC" open.
March 2014, confirmed move front rival breakfast programme Good Morning Britain, which replaced former show Daybreak.
co-hosts show alongside Piers Morgan Shephard every Monday Thursday from 8.30am.
earns annual salary £500,000 year GMB.
much weight Susanna Reid lost?
January 2019 Susanna revealed lost half stone after ditched alcohol.
said doctor warned booze after dangerously high.
doctor warned crept "top end" body mass index scale.
Susanna Reid once actress?
Susanna known treading boards when younger.
child, appeared actress stage production Agatha Christie's Spider's (1982) with Shirley-Anne Field.
then starred alongside Peter Barkworth Harriet Walter Price (1985) Channel
biggest role date starring Dreamworks animation Trolls 2016 where lent voice character Grandma Rosiepuff release only).
